heading: Maintenance and repair of real property
label: 9782 Maintenance and repair of real property
notes: Amendments2021—Subsecs. (c), (d). inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021—Subsecs. (c), (d). inserted “or the Space Force” after “the Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283

children.heading: .—Allocation of Funds
children.label: a .—Allocation of Funds
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force shall allocate funds authorized to be appropriated by a provision described in subsection (c) and a provision described in subsection (d) for maintenance and repair of real property at military installations of the Department of the Air Force without regard to whether the installation is supported with funds authorized by a provision described in subsection (c) or (d).

children.heading: .—Mixing of Funds Prohibited on Individual Projects
children.label: b .—Mixing of Funds Prohibited on Individual Projects
children.text: The Secretary of the Air Force may not combine funds authorized to be appropriated by a provision described in subsection (c) and funds authorized to be appropriated by a provision described in subsection (d) for an individual project for maintenance and repair of real property at a military installation of the Department of the Air Force.

children.heading: .—Research, Development, Test, and Evaluation Funds
children.label: c .—Research, Development, Test, and Evaluation Funds
children.text: The provision described in this subsection is a provision of a national defense authorization Act that authorizes funds to be appropriated for a fiscal year to the Air Force or the Space Force for research, development, test, and evaluation.

children.heading: .—Operation and Maintenance Funds
children.label: d .—Operation and Maintenance Funds
children.text: The provision described in this subsection is a provision of a national defense authorization Act that authorizes funds to be appropriated for a fiscal year to the Air Force or the Space Force for operation and maintenance.
